task_completion.description: Verify the agent loaded the broken shapefile into the GIS application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layer 'cities_missing_prj' should be visible in the layers panel or map view of the GIS software.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the layer properties or CRS assignment dialog for the broken shapefile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box for Layer Properties, Coordinate Reference System (CRS), or similar settings is open for the 'cities_missing_prj' layer.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent assigned the correct source CRS (WGS 84 / EPSG:4326) to the broken shapefile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CRS dialog shows 'EPSG:4326' or 'WGS 84' being selected or applied as the current/source coordinate system for the layer.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiated the export or reprojection process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export', 'Save As', or 'Reproject' dialog box is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent set the target CRS to Web Mercator (EPSG:3857) for the export.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The export or reprojection dialog explicitly shows the target CRS set to 'EPSG:3857', 'Web Mercator', or 'Pseudo-Mercator'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent specified the correct output file path for the reprojected shapefile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file path '/home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/cities_web_mercator.shp' is typed into the save destination field, or a success message confirming this exact path is visible.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the GIS graphical user interface rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be interacting with the GIS software's GUI (e.g., gvSIG or QGIS). There should be no terminal windows open running GDAL/OGR commands like 'ogr2ogr'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not simply create a .prj file using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must use the GIS software's CRS and export tools. There should be no text editors (like gedit, nano, or vim) open to manually paste WKT projection strings into a new .prj file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually used the software's export/reproject functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for genuine GIS export/save dialogs with CRS transformation options, rather than just renaming or copying files in a file manager.
